title: erysimastrum leucanthemum
intro: Erysimastrum leucanthemum, also known as the white-flowered Erysimastrum, is a flowering plant species in the family Rutaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Erysimastrum leucanthemum include its potential to reduce fever, treat wounds, and alleviate respiratory issues. Erysimastrum leucanthemum is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is used in herbal medicine to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
